colors.scheme: warm-neutral background (cream/warm gray), green primary accents, light mode only

shadows.default: Soft, layered, elevation system, hover accent for cards and buttons

shared_components.name: Header
shared_components.purpose: Site-wide top navigation with call-to-action triggers. Visual anchor for brand and major sections.

shared_components.name: HeroFoodRelief
shared_components.purpose: Instantly inspires trust, frames the mission, and drives donor/NGO action via primary CTAs.

shared_components.name: HowItWorksSteps
shared_components.purpose: Concisely educates newcomers on the platform flow for both donors and recipients.

shared_components.name: ImpactStatsStrip
shared_components.purpose: Showcases transparent, credible impact to motivate trust and action.

shared_components.name: CoreModulesFeatureGrid
shared_components.purpose: Highlights the four pivotal SaaS modules supporting the platform’s mission.

shared_components.name: TestimonialsCarousel
shared_components.purpose: Builds social proof and emotional trust across multiple stakeholder types.

shared_components.name: PartnerNGOShowcase
shared_components.purpose: Demonstrates legitimacy and scale of network through recognizable brands/orgs.

shared_components.name: VolunteerCallToAction
shared_components.purpose: Drives more signups for critical volunteer roles powering the logistics chain.

shared_components.name: FAQAccordion
shared_components.purpose: Reduces friction by addressing common uncertainties of all core roles.

shared_components.name: Footer
shared_components.purpose: Provides site navigation, trust cues, and legal. Visually anchors the bottom of site.

notes: Design DNA: Modern startup editorial: geometric sans-serif (Inter, Nunito), friendly radii, strong card separation, layered gradients, rich illustrations. Generous white space, subtle drop shadows, with soft tactile feel. Green as primary accent for food/nature (for buttons, icons, CTAs). Editorial imagery. Responsive grid for testimonials and logos. Hover and scroll-triggered animations throughout. CTA buttons: pill, large, tactile. Visuals must blend tech trust and community warmth.. Animation: Framer Motion for fade, slide, spring; card ripple/scale for hover.. Interaction: Modern, animated, with tactile hover for all CTAs/cards. Smooth spring effect on navigation and transitions. Accessible focus states.. Color scheme: warm-neutral background (cream/warm gray), green primary accents, light mode only.
